definition: Capacity to maintain essential function absorb disturbance adapt and transform
measurement_note: Use service continuity recovery capacity redundancy adaptive options and stress-tested performance indicators

definition: Condition of ecosystems biodiversity water soils climate and Earth-system processes
measurement_note: Use emissions biodiversity water stress land cover soil health nutrient flows pollution and ecosystem-function indicators

definition: Extent to which development reduces vulnerability and expands access to wellbeing
measurement_note: Use poverty housing health food energy access participation rights disability language gender race and distributional indicators

definition: Capacity to provide livelihoods productive capacity public goods and stability without overshoot
measurement_note: Use livelihood diversity employment quality household security public finance debt small business continuity and circularity indicators

definition: Ability of institutions to coordinate enforce learn finance regulate and protect rights
measurement_note: Use public trust budgets staffing policy implementation accountability participation data systems and anti-capture safeguards

definition: Ability to monitor learn revise assumptions innovate and transform under changing conditions
measurement_note: Use scenario planning monitoring institutional learning local knowledge experimentation finance and adaptive pathways

definition: Pressure from emissions extraction water use land conversion pollution material throughput or ecological overshoot
measurement_note: Higher values should trigger ecological-boundary and resource-pressure review

definition: Capital administrative political technical and institutional burden required to implement a pathway
measurement_note: Higher values should trigger feasibility governance finance and sequencing review
